hooks.command: sh -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); exec "$ROOT/scripts/run_agent_hook_guard.sh" codex user-prompt-submit'
sh -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); exec "$ROOT/scripts/run_agent_hook_guard.sh" codex pre-tool-use'
sh -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); exec "$ROOT/scripts/run_agent_hook_guard.sh" codex permission-request'
sh -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); exec "$ROOT/scripts/run_agent_hook_guard.sh" codex stop'
